37. Repeal of Cap.416
SCHEDULE
Standards [No. 4 of 2017 99
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
A BILL
No. 4 of 2017
DateofAssent:12thApril,2017
ENTITLED
An Act to continue the existence of the Zambia Bureau of
Standardsandre-defineitspowersandfunctions;provide
forstandardisationandqualityassuranceof productsand
services through the setting of national standards and
provision of conformity assessment services for products
and services; repeal the StandardsAct, 1994; and provide
for matters connected with, or incidental to, the forego-
ing.
[13thApril,2017
ENACTEDbytheParliament of Zambia.
